abilities.name: Always Prepared
abilities.description: At the start of each session you may declare one Supply your character happened to pack. The GM must approve it — no rare Digital World items or major combat advantages. Simple supplies only: bandages, rope, a map, a Digi-Ration. Must be used this session; cannot be carried forward.

abilities.name: Field Dressing
abilities.description: Once per encounter as your Basic Action, make a Recovery check DN 10. On a success restore HP to any one target equal to your Recovery roll result. This can be used on Digimon.

abilities.name: Calculated Risk
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Reliability rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter before any roll is made, you may declare Calculated Risk. Spend 2 Hope and take -2 to the roll — if you succeed the effect is doubled (double healing, double status duration, double damage).

abilities.name: Triage
abilities.description: Field Dressing can now target two characters in the same action. Split the healing however you choose between the two targets.

abilities.name: Emergency Protocol
abilities.description: Once per session when any allied Digimon triggers the cascade, you may immediately make a Recovery check DN 14 as a Free Action off-turn. On a success that Digimon stabilizes one stage higher than the cascade result.

abilities.name: Steady the Line
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 2 ability, Reliability rank 5
abilities.description: At the start of each encounter before turns begin, you may spend your Free Action to grant all allied Digimon temporary HP equal to your Reliability rank.

abilities.name: The Backup Plan
abilities.description: Once per session when the encounter looks lost — all allied Digimon at Default Stage or below, or two or more in egg state — you may activate The Backup Plan as a Free Action. All egg-state Digimon return at In-Training with 1 HP. All Digimon at In-Training or Rookie gain 10 temporary HP.
